{"cards": [{"name": "Flames of Versatility", "mana_cost": "{2}{R}{R}", "cmc": 4, "colors": ["R"], "color_identity": ["R"], "type_line": "Instant", "oracle_text": "Choose one —
• Flames of Versatility deals 4 damage to target creature.
• Flames of Versatility deals 3 damage to target player or planeswalker.
• Destroy target artifact.", "flavor_text": ""Fire finds a way to solve most problems." —Keral, flame-caller", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "rare", "design_notes": "A modal red instant that showcases red's versatility across its slice of the color pie. The three modes cover creature removal, direct damage to players/planeswalkers, and artifact destruction - all core red abilities. Priced aggressively at 4 mana to be playable while not overpowering any single effect. Modal spells at rare can offer more flexibility than lower rarities."}, {"name": "Chronicle of the Wild Hunt", "mana_cost": "{3}{G}", "cmc": 4, "colors": ["G"], "color_identity": ["G"], "type_line": "Enchantment — Saga", "oracle_text": "I — Search your library for up to two basic land cards, reveal them, put them into your hand, then shuffle.
II — Create a 3/3 green Beast creature token.
III — Creatures you control get +2/+2 and trample until end of turn.", "flavor_text": null, "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "rare", "design_notes": "A green Saga that tells the story of a growing wild hunt over three chapters. Chapter I provides land acceleration (to hand, not battlefield, for balance). Chapter II creates a threat. Chapter III delivers a powerful alpha strike effect. Each chapter represents escalating wildness and power, fitting green's philosophy of natural growth and overwhelming force."}, {"name": "Resonant Caverns", "mana_cost": "", "cmc": 0, "colors": [], "color_identity": [], "type_line": "Land", "oracle_text": "~ enters tapped.
{T}: Add {C}.
{3}, {T}: Scry 2.", "flavor_text": "The crystals within sing with ancient memories.", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "uncommon", "design_notes": "A colorless utility land that enters tapped to balance its additional ability. The scry 2 ability costs 3 generic mana plus tap, making it a reasonable late-game mana sink that provides card selection. Appropriate power level for uncommon - useful without being format-warping. The enters tapped clause prevents it from being a strict upgrade to basic lands."}, {"name": "Forest", "mana_cost": "", "cmc": 0, "colors": [], "color_identity": ["G"], "type_line": "Basic Land — Forest", "oracle_text": "{T}: Add {G}.", "flavor_text": "Where ancient roots run deep, new growth finds its strength.", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "A basic Forest with evocative flavor text that captures the essence of green mana - the connection between ancient wisdom and new growth. Basic lands have color identity matching their mana production despite having no colored mana costs. Simple, iconic design that serves as the foundation of Magic's mana system."}]}
